title: Image Request Page
wikitext:
This page is for discussion for getting images from other contributors for Evapedia articles.

If you're not sure what a picture should be named, just enter a brief description, or link to a related article for ideas, or look at naming conventions (names of images aren't really that important, though make sure something doesn't already have the name you want).  

For comments on policies, other users, technology, and other miscellaneous concerns that are not directly related to posting images, please ask in the forums.  

==Screenshots==

===By Episode===
*Good copies (Renewal-quality, I guess) for each of the 3 different versions of Asuka sitting in the bathtub episode 24, needed for this page: http://evacommentary.org/FGP/Asuka%27s_Roman_Bath%3F The original Pre-Renewal version, the Renewal-DC version and Renewal-OA version would be appreciated.  Thanks! --Sailor Star Dust
::Pre-Renewal OA, or pre-Renewal DC? --Reichu
:::Whoops. Late reply is late. -_- I think both are actually needed so the differences can be seen. --[[User:Sailor Star Dust|Sailor Star Dust]] 12:39, 2 January 2008 (PST)

*For the dummy system page:  
:the dummy system taking over from Shinji in Ep. 18
:the Rei dummy plug being loaded in Ep. 19
:a Kaworu plug from EOE

Thank you  --[[User:The wayneiac|thewayneiac]]  19:10 EDT.  May 5, 2009.

::You actually don't get a good look at the dummy plug in episode 19 -- you want a screenshot anyway? 

::I uploaded the other ones you asked for, along with some you didn't. Check out Logs. --[[User:Reichu|Reichu]] 21:34, 5 May 2009 (PDT)

:::The Rei plug shot from Ep. 17 is fine, thank you, and the giant brain shot will be great for the Dummy Plug Plant page.  --[[User:The wayneiac|thewayneiac]]  20:09 EDT.  May 6, 2009.

Is it possible for me to get a Renewal quality shot of Unit 01 with glowing wings from the end of 25'/beginning of 26'? it is for my article on Nausicaa for the Tributes page. Thank you. --[[User:Cyharding|Cyharding]] 02:34, 25 April 2010 (UTC)

::I can try for a decent quality shot... A bit of clearing up in photo editing would make it more clear... by quality you're not referring to the aspect ratio I assume? --[[User:DanYeomans|DanYeomans]]  15:52 EDT.  January 9, 2013.

===Characters===

===Angels and Evangelions===

Not sure if this is already on the wiki, but I could use a pic of Yui in Unit-01 floating out into space in EoE. It's for her [[Yui Ikari|page]]. --[[User:Ironfoot|Ironfoot]] 11:51, 17 April 2009 (PDT)
:Here: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Image:Eoe_eva01_space.jpg  --[[User:Ornette|Ornette]] 17:04, 17 April 2009 (PDT)
::Probably better to use screenshots straight off the DVD than the reencoding. 
:::-->[[:Image:M26 C459 eva01-hair.jpg|Closeup]]
:::-->[[:Image:M26 C459 eva01-spear.jpg|Eva-01 with Spear]]
::--[[User:Reichu|Reichu]] 20:24, 17 April 2009 (PDT)
Thank you! --[[User:Ironfoot|Ironfoot]] 00:43, 20 April 2009 (PDT)

===Locations===

==Other versions of an existing image==

(To request a better or altered version of an image which currently exists on the site in some form; please link to the image under discussion)

====Transformers x Evangelion====
[[List of Neon Genesis Evangelion Crossovers]]
I need an picture of Eva-Optimus Prime and pictures of the Transformers x Evangelion Transformers mode Eva stories and toyline for their wiki because I’m new to this wiki and don’t know how to upload them and the crossover is official so the wiki is safe although there nothing invent guideline for official crossovers {[[User:Nelspeedracer|Nelspeedracer]] ([[User talk:Nelspeedracer|talk]])}

[[Category:Wiki Support]]
html:
This page is for discussion for getting images from other contributors for Evapedia articles.

If you're not sure what a picture should be named, just enter a brief description, or link to a related article for ideas, or look at naming conventions (names of images aren't really that important, though make sure something doesn't already have the name you want).

For comments on policies, other users, technology, and other miscellaneous concerns that are not directly related to posting images, please ask in the forums.

Contents

  • 1 Screenshots
    • 1.1 By Episode
    • 1.2 Characters
    • 1.3 Angels and Evangelions
    • 1.4 Locations
  • 2 Other versions of an existing image
  • 3 Behind the Scenes/Production Drawings and Art
  • 4 Portraits and Promotional Photos
  • 5 Manga comic scans
  • 6 Artwork
  • 7 Miscellaneous
    • 7.1 Crossovers
      • 7.1.1 Transformers x Evangelion

Screenshots[edit]

By Episode[edit]

  • Good copies (Renewal-quality, I guess) for each of the 3 different versions of Asuka sitting in the bathtub episode 24, needed for this page: http://evacommentary.org/FGP/Asuka%27s_Roman_Bath%3F The original Pre-Renewal version, the Renewal-DC version and Renewal-OA version would be appreciated. Thanks! --Sailor Star Dust
Pre-Renewal OA, or pre-Renewal DC? --Reichu
Whoops. Late reply is late. -_- I think both are actually needed so the differences can be seen. --Sailor Star Dust 12:39, 2 January 2008 (PST)
  • For the dummy system page:
the dummy system taking over from Shinji in Ep. 18
the Rei dummy plug being loaded in Ep. 19
a Kaworu plug from EOE

Thank you --thewayneiac 19:10 EDT. May 5, 2009.

You actually don't get a good look at the dummy plug in episode 19 -- you want a screenshot anyway?
I uploaded the other ones you asked for, along with some you didn't. Check out Logs. --Reichu 21:34, 5 May 2009 (PDT)
The Rei plug shot from Ep. 17 is fine, thank you, and the giant brain shot will be great for the Dummy Plug Plant page. --thewayneiac 20:09 EDT. May 6, 2009.

Is it possible for me to get a Renewal quality shot of Unit 01 with glowing wings from the end of 25'/beginning of 26'? it is for my article on Nausicaa for the Tributes page. Thank you. --Cyharding 02:34, 25 April 2010 (UTC)

I can try for a decent quality shot... A bit of clearing up in photo editing would make it more clear... by quality you're not referring to the aspect ratio I assume? --DanYeomans 15:52 EDT. January 9, 2013.

Characters[edit]

Angels and Evangelions[edit]

Not sure if this is already on the wiki, but I could use a pic of Yui in Unit-01 floating out into space in EoE. It's for her page. --Ironfoot 11:51, 17 April 2009 (PDT)

Here: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Image:Eoe_eva01_space.jpg --Ornette 17:04, 17 April 2009 (PDT)
Probably better to use screenshots straight off the DVD than the reencoding.
-->Closeup
-->Eva-01 with Spear
--Reichu 20:24, 17 April 2009 (PDT)

Thank you! --Ironfoot 00:43, 20 April 2009 (PDT)

Article: Image Request Page
This page is for discussion for getting images from other contributors for Evapedia articles.

If you're not sure what a picture should be named, just enter a brief description, or link to a related article for ideas, or look at naming conventions (names of images aren't really that important, though make sure something doesn't already have the name you want).  

For comments on policies, other users, technology, and other miscellaneous concerns that are not directly related to posting images, please ask in the forums.
